Label: MAUDE Report
Description: A Medical Device Report (MDR) in the FDA Manufacturer and User Facility Device Experience (MAUDE) adverse event reporting system.

Label: Medical Device
Description: A medical device that is the subject of an adverse event report in the FDA MAUDE database.

Label: dataset
Description: A set of RDF triples that are published, maintained or aggregated by a single provider.

Label: datatype
Description: The datatype that is required of literals to be included into a datatype-based partition.

Label: object datatype partition
Description: A subset of a void:Dataset that contains only literals that have a certain datatype.

Label: object class partition
Description: A subset of a void:Dataset that contains only entities of a certain rdfs:Class that occur in the object position of triples in the dataset.

Label: date of event
Description: The date on which the adverse event involving the medical device occurred.

Label: date received
Description: The date on which the MAUDE adverse event report was received by the FDA.

Label: event type
Description: The type of adverse event reported in the MAUDE report (e.g., injury, malfunction, death).

Label: involves device
Description: Links a MAUDE adverse event report to the medical device involved in the event.

Label: label
Description: A human-readable label for the medical device resource.

Label: product code
Description: The FDA product code that classifies the medical device by its intended use and indication.

Label: Date Modified
Description: Date on which the resource was changed.

Label: last updated on
Description: The date this resource was last updated.

Label: version
Description: The version of the resource.

Label: class
Description: The rdfs:Class that is the rdf:type of all entities in a class-based partition.

Label: class partition
Description: A subset of a void:Dataset that contains only the entities of a certain rdfs:Class.

Label: distinct objects
Description: The total number of distinct objects in a void:Dataset. In other words, the number of distinct resources that occur in the object position of triples in the dataset. Literals are included in this count.

Label: distinct subjects
Description: The total number of distinct subjects in a void:Dataset. In other words, the number of distinct resources that occur in the subject position of triples in the dataset.

Label: number of entities
Description: The total number of entities that are described in a void:Dataset.

Label: number of properties
Description: The total number of distinct properties in a void:Dataset. In other words, the number of distinct resources that occur in the predicate position of triples in the dataset.

Label: property
Description: The rdf:Property that is the predicate of all triples in a property-based partition.

Label: property partition
Description: A subset of a void:Dataset that contains only the triples of a certain rdf:Property.

Label: number of triples
Description: The total number of triples contained in a void:Dataset.
